description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design with a mix of white and dark exterior walls. The property includes a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs. Large glass doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor patio and pool area. A driveway leads to a covered carport, and there is a wooden deck area for outdoor seating. The overall layout is open and inviting, with a focus on outdoor living and contemporary aesthetics. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden elements in the deck and fencing.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and dark walls, large windows, a pool, and landscaped outdoor spaces. The design emphasizes open, contemporary living with extensive outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped lawn with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the pool area with sun loungers and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and extensive glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden deck, additional greenery, and the back of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
